frontmatter.title: Git Field Notes
frontmatter.description: A condensed reference of Git commands and concepts including staging, commits, history exploration, stashing, tags, and repository state management.

frontmatter.title: YAML Field Notes - Scalars, Anchors, and Structures
frontmatter.description: A concise reference of YAML patterns including folded and multiline scalars, anchors & aliases, inline collections, and matrices.

frontmatter.title: Understanding Ansible Inventory Files
frontmatter.description: A comprehensive overview of Ansible inventory files, covering formats, hosts, groups, variables, and dynamic inventory concepts.

frontmatter.title: Ansible Field Notes
frontmatter.description: A practical collection of Ansible patterns including adhoc commands, loops, handlers, conditionals, roles, and execution strategies.

frontmatter.title: Flutter & Dart Notes
frontmatter.description: A collection of Flutter and Dart notes including commands, Firebase setup, routing, state management, and language features.

frontmatter.title: CSS Fundamentals
frontmatter.description: A structured reference of CSS fundamentals including specificity, inheritance, selectors, layout systems, and rendering behavior.

frontmatter.title: STP Field Notes
frontmatter.description: A practical cheatsheet for configuring and understanding Spanning Tree Protocol (STP), including MST, PVST+, and operational parameters.
